meta.title: Legacy Android apps — Dreambit Applications
meta.description: Archive of classic Android apps originally published under Dreambit Applications (2012–2016). Not maintained. Google Play links are provided where listings remain available.

hero.logoAlt: DreamBit — stylized D with B in negative space and DreamBit wordmark
hero.title: Dreambit Applications — legacy Android apps
hero.subtitle: Original Android titles from the Dreambit team era. Listed for history and transparency.
hero.unmaintained: These apps are not maintained. They may not run correctly on modern Android. Install and use at your own risk.
hero.brandNote: Dreambit Applications was the former publishing name. Zuki Apps hosts this page as a courtesy archive; active Zuki Apps products are listed separately on the home page.

hushGallery.title: Hush Gallery (original)
hushGallery.description: Private, local photo and video gallery — keep personal media on your device.

whistleCamera.title: Whistle Camera (original)
whistleCamera.description: Take photos with a whistle — hands-free shutter for selfies and groups.

navigUp.title: NavigUp
navigUp.description: Helps keep your navigation app on top of the screen while driving.

worldCup2014.title: World Cup 2014 trivia game
worldCup2014.description: Football trivia focused on the 2014 FIFA World Cup.

trickyRooms.title: Tricky Rooms
trickyRooms.description: Puzzle game — find what is wrong in each picture.

flipLight.title: Flip Light
flipLight.description: Flashlight that turns off when the phone is placed face down.

privacy.metaTitle: Privacy — Legacy Dreambit Android apps | Zuki Apps
privacy.description: Privacy policy for the legacy Dreambit Applications Android archive on Zuki Apps.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy — Legacy Dreambit Android apps
privacy.intro: This policy explains how this archive page works and how legacy apps may relate to your data. It does not replace Google Play or the original publishers’ disclosures.
privacy.s1b: This listing is published by Zuki Apps. The applications were originally offered under Dreambit Applications. Zuki Apps does not ship updates or support for these legacy builds.
privacy.s2b: This site may use standard analytics (e.g. page views) as described in Zuki Apps’ general practices. This archive page does not run the Android apps themselves.
privacy.s3b: If you install from Google Play, Google’s terms and the store listing apply. Unmaintained apps may request permissions (camera, storage, location, etc.) typical for their category; behaviour on current Android versions is not guaranteed.
privacy.s4b: Some titles were casual games. Parents should review each store listing before allowing installation.

terms.metaTitle: Terms of Use — Legacy Dreambit Android apps | Zuki Apps
terms.description: Terms of use for the legacy Dreambit Applications Android archive on Zuki Apps.
terms.title: Terms of Use — Legacy Dreambit Android apps
terms.intro: By using this page or installing linked legacy software, you agree to the following.
terms.s1b: Legacy software is provided as-is, without warranties. Features may be broken; apps may be removed from stores without notice.
terms.s2b: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zuki Apps is not liable for damages arising from use of unmaintained third-party or historic software obtained via linked stores.
terms.s3b: Google Play, device manufacturers, and OS vendors are independent; their terms govern downloads and platform behaviour.
terms.s4b: This informational page may be updated at any time.
